description: Feature improvements — YouTube adapter for demo streaming, camera CRUD, dual calendar date picker, password change, email invitation

userStories.title: YouTube adapter container with yt-dlp + FFmpeg
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a new container that pulls YouTube videos and pushes them as RTMP streams to the streaming server, so that we can demo the system without real cameras.
acceptanceCriteria: New service youtube-adapter in services/youtube-adapter/
Dockerfile includes yt-dlp and FFmpeg
Reads source config from JSON file (array of {id, youtubeUrl, streamKey})
Uses yt-dlp to get stream URL, FFmpeg to push to rtmp://streaming:1935/live/{streamKey} with -c copy (no transcoding)
Loops video on completion (continuous streaming)
Health endpoint at GET /healthz
Added to docker-compose.yml with sentinel-net network
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Configure 2 sample YouTube streams from YC-corporation channel
userStories.description: As a user, I need sample camera feeds showing real content so that I can demo the monitoring system.
acceptanceCriteria: Config file at config/youtube-sources.json with 2 videos from https://www.youtube.com/@YC-corporation
Stream keys match camera entries: e.g. yt-cam-1, yt-cam-2
Both streams visible in CCTV multi-view after startup
Streams play continuously (loop on end)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Camera CRUD — DB schema update and API
userStories.description: As an admin, I need API endpoints to add, edit, and delete cameras so that camera management doesn't require config file changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration adds stream_key, source_type (rtsp/youtube), source_url, enabled columns to cameras table
POST /api/cameras creates a camera (admin only)
PUT /api/cameras/{id} updates a camera (admin only)
DELETE /api/cameras/{id} removes a camera (admin only)
GET /api/cameras returns all cameras (existing, enhanced with new fields)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Camera CRUD — Hot reload endpoint on cctv-adapter
userStories.description: As the system, I need cctv-adapter to reload its camera list from the API without restart so that new cameras start streaming immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/cameras/reload on cctv-adapter triggers re-fetch of camera config
Stops streams for removed cameras, starts streams for new cameras
Existing streams for unchanged cameras are not interrupted
web-backend calls reload after camera create/update/delete
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Camera management UI
userStories.description: As an admin, I need to add, edit, and delete cameras from the web UI so that I can manage cameras without SSH access.
acceptanceCriteria: Camera management section in Management tab (admin only)
List of cameras with name, location, zone, source type, enabled status
Add camera form: name, location, zone, source_type (RTSP/YouTube), source_url, stream_key
Edit camera inline or via modal
Delete camera with confirmation dialog
After add/edit/delete, triggers adapter reload automatically
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Dual calendar date range picker for incidents
userStories.description: As a user, I want to select a date range using two side-by-side calendars so that filtering incidents by period is intuitive.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace current date input fields with dual calendar component
Two calendars side by side: start month (left) and end month (right)
Click first date to set start, click second date to set end
Selected range highlighted visually between start and end dates
Navigation arrows to move months forward/backward
Reset button to clear date filter
Mobile: calendars stack vertically
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Password change API
userStories.description: As a user, I need an API endpoint to change my password so that I can update my credentials.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/auth/change-password accepts {currentPassword, newPassword}
Verifies current password matches before updating
New password minimum 8 characters
Password hashed with bcrypt before storage
Returns 400 if current password wrong, 400 if new password too short
Any authenticated user can change their own password
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Password change UI in settings
userStories.description: As a user, I need a password change form in the Settings tab so that I can update my password from the app.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings tab shows password change section
Form fields: current password, new password, confirm new password
Client-side validation: new password minimum 8 chars, confirm must match
Success message on change, error message on failure
Fields cleared after successful change
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Email sending capability in notifier
userStories.description: As the system, I need notifier to send emails via SMTP so that invitation emails can be dispatched.
acceptanceCriteria: New POST /api/send-email endpoint on notifier
Accepts {to, subject, body} (HTML body supported)
SMTP config via env vars: SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASS, SMTP_FROM
If SMTP not configured, returns 503 with email not configured message
Logs send success/failure
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Invitation API in web-backend
userStories.description: As an admin, I need to create invitations that generate a unique registration URL and trigger an email.
acceptanceCriteria: New invitations table: id, email, token (UUID), status (pending/accepted/expired), created_at, expires_at (7 days)
POST /api/invitations creates invitation, calls notifier to send email (admin only)
Email contains registration URL: {FRONTEND_URL}/register?invite={token}
GET /api/invitations lists all invitations with status (admin only)
DELETE /api/invitations/{id} cancels invitation (admin only)
GET /api/invitations/verify/{token} validates token (public, for registration page)
Registration with valid invite token auto-approves user (skips admin approval)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Invitation management UI
userStories.description: As an admin, I need to invite users by email and see invitation status in the management tab.
acceptanceCriteria: Invitation section in Management tab (admin only)
Invite button with email input field
List of sent invitations with: email, status (pending/accepted/expired), date
Cancel button per pending invitation
Registration page shows invited context when accessed via invite link
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
